criteria.reason: Runtime DB compatibility improved through cursor-level placeholder adaptation and removal of INSERT OR REPLACE runtime paths found in main.py.
Targeted rate limiting is enabled with no global blanket limit.
Docker socket moved from production compose to test override.
GigaChat TLS verification now defaults to true with explicit fallback.
Production external auth encryption fails closed without EXTERNAL_AUTH_SECRET_KEY.
Tracked artifacts and duplicate files cleaned; lint no-error gate restored. Legacy warnings remain as documented residual debt.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_query_adapter.py tests/test_parsed_payload_validation.py tests/test_auth_email_case_insensitive.py tests/test_checkout_payment_providers.py tests/test_crypto_pay_client.py tests/test_map_url_normalizer.py tests/test_review_response_utils.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_finance_kpis.py
